title: Notebook MCP Server
description: Safe reading, writing, and execution of Jupyter notebooks.

tools.name: notebook_read
tools.description: Reads a Jupyter notebook. Safely strips massive base64 images.

tools.name: notebook_append_cell
tools.description: Append a code or markdown cell to the notebook WITHOUT executing it.

tools.name: notebook_execute_all
tools.description: Executes the notebook sequentially top-to-bottom and saves outputs.
